legacy.content:
# Phase 01: Planning docs baseline - Plan 02 Summary
**Generated by planning execute**
## Tasks
- [x] 01. Ensure TASK-REGISTRY reflects Phase 01 tasks - [x] 02. Ensure .planning README explains the loop - [x] 03. Update STATE and create Plan 02 summary
## Outcomes
- **TASK-REGISTRY:** Phase 01 tasks listed (align docs, discuss-phase, plan-phase, execute, verify-work); Phase 02 and 03 high-level tasks recorded. Completed items marked Done. - **README:** `.planning/README.md` describes discuss → plan → execute → verify, key files (PROJECT, ROADMAP, REQUIREMENTS, STATE, TASK-REGISTRY, DECISIONS, ERRORS, phases, prompts), and npm commands. New contributors can run the loop from the README. - **STATE:** Updated so next action is phase verification (planning workflow).
## Phase 01 status
Planning docs baseline is complete. All Phase 01 artifacts are in place; ready for phase verification (planning workflow).
